title: Legislative Decree No. 55 of 2018 Regarding Electronic Transferable Records
summary: Enables blockchain and DLT-based trade documentation by recognising electronic transferable records as legally valid transferable instruments where functional-equivalence requirements are met, including control, integrity, endorsement, possession and cross-border treatment.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Gives legal recognition to electronic transferable records.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Legislative Decree No. 54 of 2018 and UNCITRAL Model Law on Electronic Transferable Records
